untranslatable_reason: Signal requires real-time access to model confusion matrices and true positive rates (TPR by directional class), which are not available as price/technical indicators. The core logic demands comparing 'Model TPR(down) vs Model TPR(up)' and calculating 'asymmetry_ratio = down_TPR / up_TPR >= 1.05'. These are meta-model performance metrics that cannot be expressed using standard OHLCV-derived technical indicators. Implementation requires external model performance monitoring, not backtestable price conditions.
translation_notes: This is a meta-strategy rule that requires live model retraining and performance tracking. It cannot be converted to a technical indicator-based rule. To implement: (1) Run predictive model on each retraining cycle, (2) Extract confusion matrices, (3) Calculate TPR for up/down moves separately, (4) Toggle trading direction based on asymmetry_ratio >= 1.05, (5) Exit at end of day or on model retraining. Suggested workaround: Use directional bias indicators (ADX, MACD direction) as proxies, but this does not capture the actual model performance asymmetry.
